worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "order",
  "name": "Order Module",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Order management module providing table, zone, QR code, order, and customer management with status workflow support",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "core-feature",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "menu"],
    "optional": ["notification"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "routes": true,
    "events": [
      "order.created",
      "order.updated",
      "order.confirmed",
      "order.preparing",
      "order.ready",
      "order.delivered",
      "order.completed",
      "order.cancelled",
      "order.item.added",
      "order.item.updated",
      "order.item.removed",
      "table.created",
      "table.updated",
      "table.deleted",
      "table.status.changed",
      "zone.created",
      "zone.updated",
      "zone.deleted",
      "qrcode.created",
      "qrcode.scanned",
      "qrcode.deleted",
      "customer.created",
      "customer.updated",
      "service.requested",
      "service.resolved",
      "feedback.submitted"
    ],
    "hooks": [
      "beforeOrderCreate",
      "afterOrderCreate",
      "beforeStatusChange",
      "afterStatusChange",
      "beforeItemAdd",
      "afterItemAdd",
      "beforeTableCreate",
      "afterTableCreate",
      "beforeQRCodeGenerate",
      "afterQRCodeGenerate"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "order:read",
      "order:create",
      "order:update",
      "order:delete",
      "order:manage",
      "table:read",
      "table:create",
      "table:update",
      "table:delete",
      "table:manage",
      "zone:read",
      "zone:create",
      "zone:update",
      "zone:delete",
      "qrcode:read",
      "qrcode:create",
      "qrcode:delete",
      "customer:read",
      "customer:create",
      "customer:update",
      "customer:delete",
      "feedback:read",
      "feedback:manage",
      "service:read",
      "service:manage"
    ],
    "services": [
      "OrderService",
      "TableService",
      "ZoneService",
      "QRCodeService",
      "CustomerService",
      "ServiceRequestService",
      "FeedbackService"
    ]
  },

  "requires": {
    "permissions": ["auth:verify", "organization:read", "menu:read"],
    "events": ["organization.created", "menu.published"]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "starter",
    "features": {
      "starter": ["basic_orders", "max_500_orders_month", "service_requests"],
      "professional": ["table_management", "kitchen_display", "waiter_app", "max_2500_orders_month"],
      "business": ["advanced_analytics", "loyalty_program", "max_10000_orders_month"],
      "enterprise": ["unlimited_orders", "custom_workflows", "api_access"]
    }
  },

  "lifecycle": {
    "install": "lifecycle/install.ts",
    "uninstall": "lifecycle/uninstall.ts",
    "activate": "lifecycle/activate.ts",
    "deactivate": "lifecycle/deactivate.ts",
    "upgrade": "lifecycle/upgrade.ts"
  },

  "admin": {
    "menu": {
      "label": "Orders",
      "icon": "ph-receipt",
      "route": "/admin/orders",
      "order": 30,
      "hidden": false
    },
    "submenu": [
      {
        "label": "All Orders",
        "route": "/admin/orders",
        "icon": "ph-list-numbers",
        "order": 1
      },
      {
        "label": "Tables",
        "route": "/admin/orders/tables",
        "icon": "ph-table",
        "order": 2
      },
      {
        "label": "Zones",
        "route": "/admin/orders/zones",
        "icon": "ph-squares-four",
        "order": 3
      },
      {
        "label": "QR Codes",
        "route": "/admin/orders/qrcodes",
        "icon": "ph-qr-code",
        "order": 4
      },
      {
        "label": "Customers",
        "route": "/admin/orders/customers",
        "icon": "ph-users",
        "order": 5
      },
      {
        "label": "Feedback",
        "route": "/admin/orders/feedback",
        "icon": "ph-chat-circle-text",
        "order": 6
      }
    ]
  },

  "settings": {
    "schema": "settings.schema.json",
    "defaults": {
      "defaultCurrency": "TRY",
      "orderNumberPrefix": "ORD",
      "autoCompleteDelayMinutes": 30,
      "enableTableOrdering": true,
      "enableTakeaway": true,
      "enableDelivery": false,
      "enableServiceRequests": true,
      "requireCustomerInfo": false,
      "enableFeedback": true,
      "feedbackReminderDelayMinutes": 60,
      "taxRate": 10,
      "maxItemsPerOrder": 50,
      "maxOrderNoteLength": 500
    }
  }
}
